content.full_text:
November 3, 2008

Mr. Bill Hepworth  
18 Main Street  
Sutter Creek, CA 95685

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-08-160

Dear Mr. Hepworth:

This letter is to inform you that we have withdrawn your request for advice regarding the Act’s conflict of interest provisions. On September 23, 2008 we asked you to provide additional factual information regarding your economic interests. On October 14, 2008, you left a telephone message indicating that your wife’s brokerage business was then in the process of being sold, and you indicated that you would provide us with further information in three days time. We understand that this transaction may be complex, but we cannot offer advice on your question without a full understanding of potentially involved economic interests. If you wish to resubmit your request with updated information, we will be happy to provide the advice you seek.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock  
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
